_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: If you'll excuse me, I have to make that call
expression: If you'll excuse me, I have to make that call

sentences.en: I understand you're looking for a business connection.
No, no, no. This isn't the man, Meyer. This is the friend that I told you about.
sentences.ko: 아니, 아니에요. 이 사람이 아니에요, 마이어. 내가 말했던 그 친구예요.

sentences.en: Oh, I beg your pardon. I had a wrong man.
sentences.ko: 오, 이거 실례했소. 사람을 잘못 봤군.

sentences.en: ★ If you'll excuse me, I have to make that call.
sentences.ko: ★ 실례 좀 하겠네. 그 전화를 해야 해서.
